title: Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
